description: CompositionNavy blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery tantra pays tribute to the classic beatles album “Help!” with this t-shirt. So all you beatles fans, add on this tee to your collection and pay tribute to the famous band of the yesteryears. Team it with rigged denims and  sneakers for a cool rockstar look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'; Chest-37"; Waist-32"
